title: Dan Loeb Reveals DOJ Threat to Trump Over Ross Ulbricht Commutation in Final Hours of First Term
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Dan Loeb Reveals DOJ Threat to Trump Over Ross Ulbricht Commutation in Final Hours of First Term

Hedge fund manager Dan Loeb disclosed that the DOJ warned President Trump it would “go after” him if he commuted Ross Ulbricht’s sentence on the last day of his first term, delaying the Silk Road founder’s release until a full pardon in January 2025.

This post Dan Loeb Reveals DOJ Threat to Trump Over Ross Ulbricht Commutation in Final Hours of First Term first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Juan Galt.

title: Crypto Industry Heavyweights Urge Senate to Pass Clarity Act With Developer Protections Intact
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Crypto Industry Heavyweights Urge Senate to Pass Clarity Act With Developer Protections Intact

More than 60 leading crypto executives urged Senate leaders to pass the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act with its blockchain developer protections intact.

This post Crypto Industry Heavyweights Urge Senate to Pass Clarity Act With Developer Protections Intact first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Five Years On, El Salvador Is Still Buying Bitcoin
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Five Years On, El Salvador Is Still Buying Bitcoin

Five years ago yesterday, El Salvador’s Congress voted 62-to-22 to pass the world’s first Bitcoin Law, making the small Central American nation the first country on earth to grant bitcoin legal tender status.  The date was June 8, 2021. Half a decade later, the government holds 7,677 BTC worth approximately $480 million — and it […]

This post Five Years On, El Salvador Is Still Buying Bitcoin first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Second Launches Bark on Bitcoin Mainnet, Targeting Self-Custody UX Gap
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Second Launches Bark on Bitcoin Mainnet, Targeting Self-Custody UX Gap

Second has officially launched Bark — its implementation of the Ark protocol — on the Bitcoin mainnet.

This post Second Launches Bark on Bitcoin Mainnet, Targeting Self-Custody UX Gap first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Coinbase Executive: Massive Institutions Are Buying Bitcoin’s Crash
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Coinbase Executive: Massive Institutions Are Buying Bitcoin’s Crash

Despite Bitcoin's 50% collapse from its all-time high, Coinbase's head of institutional strategy says sovereign wealth funds, family offices, and major institutions are aggressively buying the dip.

This post Coinbase Executive: Massive Institutions Are Buying Bitcoin’s Crash first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Bitcoin Price Holds Near $63,000 as Analysts Say Its Store-of-Value Thesis Remains Intact
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Price Holds Near $63,000 as Analysts Say Its Store-of-Value Thesis Remains Intact

Bitcoin remains under pressure from ETF outflows, AI-driven capital rotation, and corporate selling, but institutional analysts argue its long-term store-of-value thesis remains intact as large investors continue accumulating while retail sentiment weakens.

This post Bitcoin Price Holds Near $63,000 as Analysts Say Its Store-of-Value Thesis Remains Intact first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.
